PartyReviewApp.name: PartyReviewApp
used_by_tasks: Party Review PR.1: Party reviewer decision

review_items.issue: PartyReviewApp is not deployed as an Action App in the tenant. On APPROVE, the app must set `partyOverride = true` (gates Party Validation's completion re-evaluation) AND `approvedOverride = true` (read by ReleaseCoordinatorAgent at Released). On REJECT, no override flag is set — case routes directly to Rejected via exit-only.

PortReviewApp.name: PortReviewApp
used_by_tasks: Port Review PoR.1: Port reviewer decision

review_items.issue: PortReviewApp is not deployed as an Action App in the tenant. On APPROVE, the app must set `portOverride = true` (gates Port Readiness's completion re-evaluation) AND `approvedOverride = true`. On REJECT, no override flag — case routes directly to Rejected via exit-only.

DocumentReviewApp.name: DocumentReviewApp
used_by_tasks: Document Review DR.1: Document reviewer decision

review_items.issue: DocumentReviewApp is not deployed as an Action App in the tenant. App must expose five `file` output fields (bolDocument, cargoManifestDocument, certificateOfOriginDocument, insuranceCertificateDocument, qualityCertificateDocument) and route the reviewer's re-uploaded file into whichever one matches `flaggedDocument` (set by VerificationAgent); the other four emit null. On APPROVE, the app must additionally set `approvedOverride = true` (no per-lane flag — Doc Review forward-routes to Document Intake; gates are not bypassed). On REJECT, no override flag — case routes directly to Rejected via exit-only.

Both MeridianCase and VoyageRelease cases will fire on the same MeridianCase entity record creation. Each new record will spawn one case of each kind. Confirm intended; if not, author a dedicated VoyageRelease entity in Data Fabric and re-point the trigger.
